category_sources: source_facts.description says "File-based build system"; official manual describes Tup as a file-based build system for translating input files to output files via Tupfiles.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is "tup"; official manual title and GitHub repo use "tup".
docs_sources: Official project site provides a Manual page, Getting Started, Examples, and related documentation links.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/gittup/tup; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a file-based build system; official manual describes dependency graph updates, Tupfiles, and build outputs.
